strings.Applicazione educativa che esplora il ri: An educational application exploring handwriting recognition and AI-assisted learning workflows.
strings.Apri la console del browser per vedere i: Open the browser console to see which file failed to load.
strings.Codice e materiali della tesi triennale: Code and materials from my bachelor's thesis on Physics-Informed Neural Networks for solving differential equations.
strings.Esperimenti sul trasferimento di conosce: Experiments in transferring knowledge from larger teacher networks to compact student models.
strings.Implementazioni ed esperimenti con algor: Implementations and experiments with QR algorithms for numerical eigenvalue computation.
strings.Pipeline end-to-end per la classificazio: An end-to-end pipeline for classifying foreshocks and aftershocks from seismic waveforms, using CNNs on time-frequency representations and SHAP-based explainability.

strings.Sistema di raccomandazione musicale per: A music recommendation system for generating playlists from user and track information.
strings.Una selezione ordinata dei progetti su c: A curated selection of current and completed work across mathematics, artificial intelligence, and software development.
strings.Valutazione di modelli linguistici e str: Evaluation of language models and prompt-engineering strategies through the game Codenames.
strings.Workflow di deep learning spiegabile per: An explainable deep-learning workflow for distinguishing foreshocks and aftershocks from seismic spectrograms.
